title: UBC Abacus Dataverse Dataset
description: A research dataset stored in UBC Library's Abacus Dataverse repository (Dataverse 5.9). Field set derived from the live OpenAPI Dataset schema.

id.description: Internal numeric database id of the dataset.

authority.description: Identifier authority/prefix for the persistent id.

identifier.description: Identifier portion of the persistent id.

fileAccessRequest.description: Whether file access requests are enabled.

harvested.description: Whether the dataset was harvested from a remote source.

files.description: Data files contained in this dataset.
